sentence: 进入公司大楼需要出示工作证。
pinyin: Jìnrù gōngsī dàlóu xūyào chūshì gōng zuò zhèng.
english: You need to show your employee ID card to enter the company building.

meaning: meat that has been cured and air-dried in the cold (esp. during the 12
sentence: 妈妈每年冬天都会自己腌腊肉。
pinyin: Māma měinián dōngtiān dōu huì zìjǐ yān là ròu.
english: Every winter, mom cures her own air-dried pork.

sentence: 最近电价上涨了不少，电费账单高了很多。
pinyin: Zuìjìn diànjià shàngzhǎng le bùshǎo, diànfèi zhàngdān gāo le hěn duō.
english: Electricity prices have risen a lot recently, and the electric bill is much higher.

sentence: 这场自行车比赛第三赛段的路况非常复杂。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng zìxíngchē bǐsài dì sān sàiduàn de lùkuàng fēicháng fùzá.
english: The road conditions in the third stage of this cycling race are very complex.

meaning: to restructure; to reorganize; to revamp
sentence: 公司决定重整内部结构，提高工作效率。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng zhòngzhěng nèibù jiégòu, tígāo gōngzuò xiàolǜ.
english: The company decided to restructure its internal organization to improve efficiency.
